titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Branford College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1958-2013 Maintained by the Dean
Branford College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1958-2013 Maintained by the Dean
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 09:20

did.unittitle: Branford College, Yale University, student records for the Classes of 1958-2013 maintained by the dean
did.abstract: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Branford College, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-D-1 (YRG 13-D-1), Records of the dean of Branford College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Branford College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1958-2013 Maintained by the Dean (RU 254). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Branford College, Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged chronologically by class year.
